sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint requires receipt parity but does not freeze key serialization.
decisionTaken: Serialize receipt and status keys with phase2-receipt-consistency-193.v1 using tenant, lineage consistency seed, request type, semantic meaning hash, and key class.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The same facts and lineage produce the same receipt grammar regardless of channel while exact-once promotion still protects side effects.
operationalRisk: Changing key fields can duplicate receipts or cause status projections to diverge by channel.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Run receipt replay and parity fixtures before rolling a new key version.
